headline: Workday (WDAY) Partners With Anthropic and the Local Initiatives Support Corporation
summary: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY) is one of the Best Value Stocks to Buy for Long Term Investment. On May 12, Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY), in partnership with Anthropic and the Local Initiatives Support Corporation, announced the launch of its Foundation Solopreneurship Accelerator Program. ​The program is a new AI-focused initiative which is aimed at supporting small business […]

headline: Can Healthy Revenue Growth Boost Workday's Q1 Earnings?
summary: WDAY is set to report Q1 fiscal 2027 results on May 21, with expected revenue growth as demand rises for HCM, finance and AI-powered products.

headline: Another Wall Street giant drops hammer on Workday stock price target
summary: Workday (WDAY) shareholders have had a brutal year, and Wall Street keeps adding to the pile. The enterprise software giant has lost more than half its market value since early 2024, and the downgrades have stacked up across the sector as AI agents reshape how analysts model traditional SaaS ...
